title: Translation State
description: Translation contract and cache metadata. Cache hits require all fields below to match — changing any field invalidates the cache and forces re-translation.

model_id.description: Model policy identifier for translation. Use 'host_default' when the invoking host agent/CLI owns model selection.

runner.description: Execution runner used for delegated translation (e.g. 'claude', 'gemini', 'openclaw', 'custom', 'inline').

strategy.description: 'primary_model' = use the invoking host's current/default model; 'cost_optimized' is reserved for future explicit policies

prompt_version.description: Version string for the translation prompt template. Changing this invalidates all chunk translations.

glossary_hash.description: SHA256 hash of glossary.json content. If glossary changes, this changes and cache is invalidated.

chunking_hash.description: Hash of source_segments + chunking_config. If source changes or chunking config changes, cache is invalidated.

source_hash.description: Hash of the source_segments content. Detects if upstream source changed.

validator_version.description: Version of the validator script. Changing validator invalidates cache to force re-verification.

completed_at.description: ISO timestamp when all chunks were translated and validated
